text.title: Banking Core — Data Residency Rules Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree gating whether banking-core-data-residency-rules applies. Root question is a yes/no observable on the incoming task; branches name a concrete observable (`when`) and conclude either with a rule reference from 01-core-rules.xml or with a skip directive.

decision-tree.root-question: Does customer PII cross a cloud-region OR third-country boundary?

branch.conclusion: Apply Schrems II TIA + SCCs + supplementary measures.

example.description: When `yes AND eu_us_transfer` holds, the tree concludes `rule:r3` — meaning the methodology applies via that specific rule. The agent should load the referenced rule from 01-core-rules.xml and follow it.
